# Changelog

This file is auto-generated from Conventional Commits using
[conventional-changelog](https://github.com/conventional-changelog/conventional-changelog).
**Do not edit it by hand.** If you need to add or update a changelog entry, write a
proper Conventional Commit message and let the tooling do the rest.

The format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/) conventions with
Conventional Commits type mapping:

| Commit type           | Changelog section                |
|-----------------------|----------------------------------|
| `feat`                | Added                            |
| `fix`                 | Fixed                            |
| `perf`                | Changed                          |
| `refactor`            | Changed                          |
| `docs`                | _(excluded — listed separately)_ |
| `chore`, `ci`, `test` | _(excluded)_                     |

---

## [Unreleased]

_Changes since the last release will appear here after the first commit._
